seo.title: Educational Book Printing | Quarterfold Printabilities
seo.description: We print 25 million educational books a year for ministries and World Bank & USAID programmes across 25+ countries: curriculum-aligned and export-ready.

hero.title: 25 Million Books a Year. <1>Into Children's Hands.</1>
hero.sub: One partner for national textbook programmes, from ministry tender to the classroom desk.
hero.statAria: 25 million educational books printed every year
hero.statFoot: World Bank & USAID programme partner · 250+ publishers served · 800+ containers exported a year.

process.title: From ministry tender to the classroom desk.

tender.name: Tender & Specification
tender.desc: We win government and ministry tenders, then lock exact specs: trim, paper, binding and the curriculum edition.

print.name: Curriculum-Aligned Print
print.desc: Offset runs calibrated for colour at national volume, matched precisely to each country’s syllabus.

export.name: Export & Logistics
export.desc: Containerised export, customs documentation and 800+ containers a year moving to 25+ countries.

classroom.name: Into the Classroom
classroom.desc: Delivered to ministries and schools, into the hands of children across Africa and beyond.

impact.title: National syllabuses, printed and delivered.
impact.lede: Textbooks printed in India and shipped to ministries of education across the continent: tens of millions of books, one syllabus at a time.
impact.awards: <1>Four consecutive CAPEXIL export awards</1>: Education Export Company of the Year, 2024.

cta.title: Print your programme with us.
cta.sub: Ten million textbooks for a national rollout, or a first curriculum edition. Tell us the specification and we’ll come back within one business day.
